bundle.shortDescription: Local real-time voice input tool with global hotkey + Whisper offline transcription. Supports Chinese, English, Japanese & Korean. Fully private, no internet required.
bundle.longDescription:
SimpleVoice is a lightweight, completely local voice input application. Press a global hotkey to start recording — Whisper transcribes your speech instantly on your device and automatically inserts the text at the cursor position.

✅ Fully offline with Whisper models
✅ Global hotkey (customizable)
✅ Supports Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean
✅ Privacy-first: nothing leaves your computer
✅ No cloud, no telemetry, no data collection

Perfect for writers, developers, office workers, and anyone who wants fast, accurate, and private voice typing.
